UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRmuteMusic_to: Enable this option to mute all New Music Radio songs in the game.
UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRstopMusic: Stop Playing All New Music Radios
UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRstopMusic_to: Enable this option to stop all New Music Radio music from playing in the game. It removes the stutter but disconnects the sync with music on the server.
UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRenableRDS: Enable RDS On New Music Radio Stations
UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRenableRDS_to: Enable this option to activate the Radio Data System for music information on New Music Radio stations.
UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRenableRDSDev: Enable Song Announcement On New Music Radio Stations
Enable this option to activate song announcements on New Music Radio stations. (Only deactivates announcements in single player games.)
UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRthreeDoff: Disable All New Music Radio 3D Audio
UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRthreeDoff_to: This option forces all New Music Radios to lose 3D audio.
UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRaltThreeD: Enable Alternate Stereo 3D Audio For New Music Radio (Experimental)
UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRaltThreeD_to: This experimental option creates a simulated 3D audio in stereo for New Music Radio when standard 3D audio is disabled.
UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRterminalEjec: Enable The Eject Media System In Terminals (will cause a lag )
This will enable the eject media system in the terminals setup for music stations but with large music lists can cause lag pulling the song list.
UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRterminalBlac: Enable The Blacklist System In Terminals (will cause a lag )
This will enable the blacklist system in the terminals setup for music stations but with large music lists can cause lag pulling the song list.
UI_options_NewMusicRadio_NMRvolumeSlider: This will adjust the play volume of the music from radios beyond the radio volume bar.
UI_NewMusicRadio_update: Update radio playlist from terminal library
UI_NewMusicRadio_revert: Revert the radio playlist back to the entire True Music library
UI_NewMusicRadio_sayaccessblocked: I am unable to access this Terminal, the path is blocked.
UI_NewMusicRadio_sayneedsgenerator: I will need a generator nearby to power it.
